methods.description: Process for collecting various climate data sets including precipitation, temperature, and sea surface temperature data for analysis.

steps.description: We used Climatic Research Unit 0.5° grid resolution precipitation data set version 4.04 (CRU TS v.4.04; Harris et al., 2020) and CHIRPS precipitation data (Funk et al., 2015) based on remote sensing and meteorological stations for the period 1981-2020 with a spatial resolution of 0.05° × 0.05°.
steps.searchable_summary: download CRU TS v.4.04 and CHIRPS precipitation data

steps.description: Monthly regional precipitation anomalies for 1950-2008 were also developed by averaging precipitation data from 32 meteorological stations located in the study region.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate monthly regional precipitation anomalies by averaging data from 32 stations

steps.description: We used 1° grid resolution ERA5 reanalysis temperature data (Dee et al., 2011) with a time span of 1979-2018.
Global SST from NOAA NCDC Extended Reconstructed SST (ERSST version 3b) with a grid resolution of 2.0° × 2.0° from 1854 to present.
steps.searchable_summary: download NOAA NCDC ERSST v3b sea surface temperature data
outputs: sea surface temperature data from 1854 to present

methods.description: Details on the availability and access points for various datasets used in the study.

steps.description: The tree-ring stable oxygen isotopic data for the four sites and the regional instrumental precipitation data is available at https://www.ncei.noaa.gov/access/paleo-search/study/34812noaa.
steps.searchable_summary: access tree-ring stable oxygen isotopic data and regional precipitation data

steps.description: IsoGSM data were retrieved from https://isotope.iis.u-tokyo.ac.jp/~kei/tmp/isogsm2/, GNIP data from https://nucleus.iaea.org/wiser/index.aspxiaea, and Ice core data from https://www.ncdc.noaa.gov/data-access/paleoclimatology-datanoaa.
steps.searchable_summary: retrieve IsoGSM, GNIP, and ice core data

steps.description: CRU data were downloaded from https://crudata.uea.ac.uk/cru/data/hrg/uea, CHIRPS from https://www.chc.ucsb.edu/data/ chirpsucsb, ERA from https://cds.climate.copernicus.eu/cdsapp#!/dataset/reanalysis-era5-single-levels-monthly-means?tab=formcopernicus, and SSTs from https://www.ncdc.noaa.gov/data-access/marineocean-data/ extended-reconstructed-sea-surface-temperature-ersst-v5#:~:text=The%20Extended%20Reconstructed%20 Sea%20Surface,completeness%20enhanced%20using%20statistical%20methodsnoaa.
steps.searchable_summary: download CRU, CHIRPS, ERA, and SST datasets
